project.name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
project.currentFocus: Session 91 closed: membership value public cleanup shipped. /membership-value/ no longer exposes internal pricing-strategy/proposal language; annual options are now public-safe live-plan copy. Eternal/Elite no longer promises Founder video updates, and the stale pro_founder_video entitlement was removed from shared membership config.
project.nextMilestone: Verify annual checkout end-to-end in browser. Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror (pending founder confirmation). Forge Window nav rename (pending brand sign-off).
blockers: MANUAL: revoke compromised classic PAT at github.com/settings/tokens — user explicitly deferred; workflow no longer depends on it
Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror requires explicit founder confirmation before cross-repo writes
Annual checkout end-to-end not yet browser-verified (prices live, edge function deployed, but path untested in real browser)

now: [S90][COHESION] Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror — implement the cross-repo normalized activity feed mirror path. Requires cross-repo write confirmation. Social Dashboard repo present locally at `../vaultspark-social-dashboard`. [DEFERRED — awaiting founder confirm before cross-repo write]
[FOLLOWUP] Forge Window nav rename — rename "Studio Pulse" nav label to "Forge Window" sitewide via `propagate-nav.mjs`. URL stays `/studio-pulse/` for SEO. [PENDING brand sign-off]
[FOLLOWUP] Verify annual checkout end-to-end — test the annual billing toggle → checkout → Stripe → portal flow against staging. Annual prices are live but the path hasn't been browser-tested yet.
next: [SIL:2⛔] Genius Hit List as scheduled audit — DONE S88: scheduled-audit generator now exists and can be rerun with `npm run genius:list`.

[GENIUS][CONVERSION] Extend proof/depth beyond the three core pages — carry the stronger trust language into join/invite or other high-intent public entry routes if the next session stays conversion-focused.
[GENIUS][COHESION] Extend gravity onto the `/games/` and `/universe/` hubs — the per-world pages now hand off properly, but the main collection hubs can still become stronger route orchestrators.
[OPS] Annual Stripe activation once keys exist — replace the annual placeholder path only after the real Stripe annual plan keys are created.
[OPS] CF Worker automation unblock — add `CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN` so Worker deploys stop depending on local Wrangler auth.
shipped: Membership value page cleaned up: `membership-value/index.html` replaced the public "Proposed pricing innovations" section with public-safe annual options: Sparked Annual ($44.99/yr), Eternal Annual ($269.99/yr), and monthly flexibility. Removed internal strategy phrasing around churn, LTV, cash-flow predictability, market-rate timing, implementation notes, and future pricing experiments.
Eternal/Elite Founder video update removed: removed "Founder video updates" from the Eternal value summary and value table. Adjusted Eternal estimated value ranges after removing that row.
Entitlement config aligned: removed `pro_founder_video` from `assets/membership-access.js`, `assets/vault-sdk.js`, and `supabase/functions/_shared/membershipAccess.ts`.
Related website fix: `/vaultsparked/` Eternal Beta Builds copy no longer says "internal development builds"; it now uses public-facing experimental-build language.

Audit scan: targeted scan of public HTML/JS/TS files is clean for `Founder video`, `pricing innovations`, `pricing strategy`, `internal development`, `internal proto`, `LTV`, `churn`, `cash flow`, and `market rate`. Historical context/audit notes may still mention old phrasing as session history.

catalog.note: Live utility. Vault-gated promo engine, iterating on UX.

catalog.note: Metacognition training platform. Live on external infra; identity consolidating.

catalog.note: Crypto market intelligence dashboard. Production-stable v1.7.

catalog.name: StatVault
catalog.note: Sports analytics platform. ForgeRating + ForgeAI, 500K+ programmatic pages.

catalog.name: Voidfall
catalog.note: Nine-book cosmic-horror saga. Book 1 at lock. Not a game — a world.

catalog.name: VaultFront
catalog.note: Strategy world taking shape. Early runtime, big ambitions.

catalog.name: The Exodus
catalog.note: Narrative survival — a dying world, a hard decision. Direction locked, scope expanding.

catalog.name: Vorn
catalog.note: Social-first, agent-native platform. Give your agent a home.

catalog.name: VaultSpark Forge
catalog.note: Crafting-and-building world in early concept. Sealed silhouette for now.

catalog.note: Resting in the vault. Legacy GM sim, paused on known bugs.

catalog.note: Resting in the vault. Browser deployment of Gridiron GM.
